productDisplayName: Puma Men Red Winglet II Flip Flops
description: Look good and stay comfortable all year round in these puma thongs. Team them with cargo shorts for a day on the beach or for lounging by the pool side. Upper Double panel synthetic thong straps with puma cat logo Stitched toe separators Foam footbed for cushioned comfort, with a Puma cat logo Outsole TPR outsole with elevated triangular tread pattern for superior grip and durability Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
